acrostic: WARNINGS OF JUDGMENT AND PROMISES OF A NEW KING, SUFFERING SERVANT, NEW CREATION

10.acrostic: FEW TREES REMAIN SO A CHILD MAY WRITE THEM

13.acrostic: DOOM OF THE LORD COMES NEAR

14.acrostic: GOD WILL GIVE REST FROM PAIN AND FEAR SO

28.acrostic: EPHRAIM THE CROWN OF PRIDE IS FADED

29.acrostic: SEALED BOOKS CANNOT BE READ O

30.acrostic: ON HIGH MOUNTAINS ARE BROOKS OF WATER SO

33.acrostic: NOW I WILL ARISE SAYS THE LORD

36.acrostic: KING OF ASSYRIA SENT A WORD

37.acrostic: I WILL PUT A SPIRIT IN HIM SO HE HEARS A RUMOR NOW

38.acrostic: NOT SEE THE LORD IN THE LAND

41.acrostic: UPHOLD YOU WITH MY RIGHTEOUS HANDS

42.acrostic: FOR A LONG TIME I HELD MY PEACE O

43.acrostic: FOR I AM THE LORD YOUR HOLY ONE SAYS

48.acrostic: GO OUT FROM BABYLON FLEE IT
